subject: A massive entity composed of animated books, scrolls, and papers swirling in a library, bound together by a glowing ring of script
description: A towering figure made entirely of books, scrolls, and scattered papers fills the frame against a backdrop of packed library shelves. The entity has no clear face or body — it is a churning mass of bound volumes and loose pages held together by a luminous ring of glowing white script or runes that spirals around its form. More papers and books fly outward from the mass, some colliding with the shelves behind. The palette is almost entirely monochrome: cold blues, steel grays, and white glowing accents, creating a ghostly, cerebral atmosphere. The creature radiates neither aggression nor calm — it simply is, an animate accumulation of knowledge.
foreground: entity of animated books and papers with glowing rune-ring
background: packed library shelves, books flying outward
emotion: alien impassivity — no face, overwhelming scale
